label: trial_04
phase1_raw:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CommandRouter",
      "purpose": "Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler",
      "behavior": "Reads the 'command' field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function based on command string",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle create_order command: validate user, check stock, calculate total, deduct stock, create order record",
      "behavior": "Checks user existence, verifies product stock, computes total price, updates product stock, and inserts new order record",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle pay_order command: validate order, check balance, deduct balance, update order status",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is pending, verifies user balance, deducts amount from user balance, updates order status to paid",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle ship_order command: validate order and update status to shipped",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is paid, updates order status to shipped",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle complete_order command: validate order and update status to completed",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is shipped, updates order status to completed",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle cancel_order command: validate order, restore stock, refund if paid, update status",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle list_orders command: list orders with optional filters",
      "behavior": "Reads optional filters from order_data (user, status), queries orders store, returns matching orders",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user with statistics",
      "behavior": "Queries orders for given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns orders and statistics",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProductsHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle list_products command: list products with stock, optionally filter low stock",
      "behavior": "Reads optional low_stock filter from order_data, queries products store, returns products with stock info",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ResponseFormatter",
      "purpose": "Format the output as a JSON object with success, message, and data fields",
      "behavior": "Takes the result from the handler (success boolean, message string, data object) and constructs the final output JSON",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to nine specialized handlers (one per command) and a ResponseFormatter that standardizes output. This keeps each child focused on a single command, avoiding cross-calls between siblings, and maintains the same abstraction level. The parent invokes CommandRouter first, then the appropriate handler, then ResponseFormatter.",
  "dataflow_edges": [
    {
      "from_node": "parent",
      "from_output": "input",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "input",
      "note": "Pass raw input to router for command parsing"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to create order handler when command is create_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to pay order handler when command is pay_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to ship order handler when command is ship_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to complete order handler when command is complete_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to cancel order handler when command is cancel_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to list orders handler when command is list_orders"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to get user orders handler when command is get_user_orders"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to list products handler when command is list_products"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "from_output": "output",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return formatted output to parent"
    }
  ]
}

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler
children.behavior: Reads the 'command' field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function based on command string

children.name: CreateOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle create_order command: validate user, check stock, calculate total, deduct stock, create order record
children.behavior: Checks user existence, verifies product stock, computes total price, updates product stock, and inserts new order record

children.name: PayOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle pay_order command: validate order, check balance, deduct balance, update order status
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is pending, verifies user balance, deducts amount from user balance, updates order status to paid

children.name: ShipOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle ship_order command: validate order and update status to shipped
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is paid, updates order status to shipped

children.name: CompleteOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle complete_order command: validate order and update status to completed
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is shipped, updates order status to completed

children.name: CancelOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle cancel_order command: validate order, restore stock, refund if paid, update status
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled

children.name: ListOrdersHandler
children.purpose: Handle list_orders command: list orders with optional filters
children.behavior: Reads optional filters from order_data (user, status), queries orders store, returns matching orders

children.name: GetUserOrdersHandler
children.purpose: Handle get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user with statistics
children.behavior: Queries orders for given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns orders and statistics

children.name: ListProductsHandler
children.purpose: Handle list_products command: list products with stock, optionally filter low stock
children.behavior: Reads optional low_stock filter from order_data, queries products store, returns products with stock info

children.name: ResponseFormatter
children.purpose: Format the output as a JSON object with success, message, and data fields
children.behavior: Takes the result from the handler (success boolean, message string, data object) and constructs the final output JSON

phase1_parsed.decomposition_rationale: The Order Management System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to nine specialized handlers (one per command) and a ResponseFormatter that standardizes output. This keeps each child focused on a single command, avoiding cross-calls between siblings, and maintains the same abstraction level. The parent invokes CommandRouter first, then the appropriate handler, then ResponseFormatter.

dataflow_edges.note: Pass raw input to router for command parsing
Route to create order handler when command is create_order
Route to pay order handler when command is pay_order
Route to ship order handler when command is ship_order
Route to complete order handler when command is complete_order
Route to cancel order handler when command is cancel_order
Route to list orders handler when command is list_orders
Route to get user orders handler when command is get_user_orders
Route to list products handler when command is list_products
Pass handler result to formatter for output

Pass handler result to formatter for output

Pass handler result to formatter for output
Pass handler result to formatter for output

Pass handler result to formatter for output

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler
children.behavior: Reads the 'command' field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function based on command string

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: System input JSON containing 'command' and 'order_data' fields

outputs.name: command
outputs.description: The command string extracted from input (e.g., 'create_order', 'pay_order')
outputs.consumer: CreateOrderHandler, PayOrderHandler, ShipOrderHandler, CompleteOrderHandler, CancelOrderHandler, ListOrdersHandler, GetUserOrdersHandler, ListProductsHandler

outputs.name: order_data
outputs.description: The order_data dictionary extracted from input, passed to the appropriate handler
outputs.consumer: CreateOrderHandler, PayOrderHandler, ShipOrderHandler, CompleteOrderHandler, CancelOrderHandler, ListOrdersHandler, GetUserOrdersHandler, ListProductsHandler

children.name: CreateOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle create_order command: validate user, check stock, calculate total, deduct stock, create order record
children.behavior: Checks user existence, verifies product stock, computes total price, updates product stock, and inserts new order record

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing user_id, product_id, quantity

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and order_id

children.name: PayOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle pay_order command: validate order, check balance, deduct balance, update order status
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is pending, verifies user balance, deducts amount from user balance, updates order status to paid

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and order_id

children.name: ShipOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle ship_order command: validate order and update status to shipped
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is paid, updates order status to shipped

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and order_id

children.name: CompleteOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle complete_order command: validate order and update status to completed
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is shipped, updates order status to completed

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and order_id

children.name: CancelOrderHandler
children.purpose: Handle cancel_order command: validate order, restore stock, refund if paid, update status
children.behavior: Checks order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and order_id

children.name: ListOrdersHandler
children.purpose: Handle list_orders command: list orders with optional filters
children.behavior: Reads optional filters from order_data (user, status), queries orders store, returns matching orders

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing optional 'user' and 'status' filters

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and list of orders

children.name: GetUserOrdersHandler
children.purpose: Handle get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user with statistics
children.behavior: Queries orders for given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns orders and statistics

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, orders list, and statistics

children.name: ListProductsHandler
children.purpose: Handle list_products command: list products with stock, optionally filter low stock
children.behavior: Reads optional low_stock filter from order_data, queries products store, returns products with stock info

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result with success, message, and list of products

children.name: ResponseFormatter
children.purpose: Format the output as a JSON object with success, message, and data fields
children.behavior: Takes the result from the handler (success boolean, message string, data object) and constructs the final output JSON

inputs.name: result
inputs.description: Result dictionary from the handler containing success, message, and optional data
inputs.source: CreateOrderHandler, PayOrderHandler, ShipOrderHandler, CompleteOrderHandler, CancelOrderHandler, ListOrdersHandler, GetUserOrdersHandler, ListProductsHandler output

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Final output JSON with success, message, and data fields
